ValidationRule.description: The 1st AV Reduction Start Date cannot be lesser than the AV Reduction Start Date at the time of 1st AV Reduction Start Date update
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( ISNEW() ), ISCHANGED( leaseworks__X1st_Reduction_Start_Date__c ) , leaseworks__X1st_Reduction_Start_Date__c < leaseworks__Reduction_Start_Date__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 1st Reduction Start Date cannot be earlier than the provided Start Date. Please adjust the value and try to save again.
